goal: Explain the core idea of the source article.

deck_context.source_summary: Short source-wide summary that workers may need when a slide refers to the broader article.
deck_context.core_claim: The central thesis that should stay consistent across the deck.

sample_generation_method.prompt_source: the approved sample slide job prompt
sample_generation_method.input_context_preparation: inspect style references before generation; pass strict input assets with edit --image only when a slide job lists input_images
sample_generation_method.handoff_rule: Subagents must use this same backend/tool/config; use generate for new slides unless the assigned job has strict input_images or is a repair.

style.name: 手绘技术解释风
style.color_palette: white background, black marker lines, pale yellow highlights
style.typography: large readable Chinese headings, compact handwritten annotations

approved_style_reference.fidelity: match style only; do not copy layout or content

local_context.required_background: Facts, lists, definitions, comparisons, or prior-slide references this slide needs to be self-contained.

layout.composition: large title with one supporting visual

slides.title: Evidence

required_images.role: strict input asset and main evidence figure
required_images.fidelity: preserve data, axes, labels, legends, colors, and values

required_images:
strict input asset and comparison chart

layout.composition: source figure left, explanation cards right
